arts.ttl: Daegu FC vs. Barcelona: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: Barça have fielded strong starting lineups for both their friendlies this summer, hence why victories have been so straightforward, and Flick is unlikely to make significant alterations to his star-studded XI on Monday. Barcelona conclude their preseason tour of Asia on Monday when they visit Daegu FC searching for a third successive friendly victory.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Daegu FC: Flick to Name Strong Side
arts.sum: Barcelona continue their pre-season preparations for the 2025–26 campaign on Monday when they face South Korea’s Daegu FC. Hansi Flick has fielded impressive starting lineups during Barça ’s first two friendlies and is unlikely to change tack on Monday.
